parsed.reason: The assistant correctly states both key facts from the reference: (1) Mira settled best when swaddled on her back as a young baby, and (2) the swaddle was dropped at 5 months. The assistant uses paraphrasing ("settled best when swaddled on her back" vs "settled best swaddled on her back") which is acceptable. While the answer includes additional context about why swaddling is helpful and general information about the 5-month transition point, none of this contradicts the reference or fabricates specific details about Mira's experience. It accurately answers the recall question as asked.
